# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert

Use fixed executables with validated argument arrays. Do not invoke a shell with untrusted input.
# Category: command_injection

class ImageProcessingController < ApplicationController
  ALLOWED_FORMATS = %w[jpg jpeg png gif webp bmp tiff].freeze
  MAX_SIZE = 5000
  MIN_SIZE = 1
  CONVERT_PATH = '/usr/bin/convert'

  def convert_image
    uploaded_file = params[:image]
    format = params[:format]
    width = params[:width]
    height = params[:height]

    unless uploaded_file.present?
      render json: { error: 'No image uploaded' }, status: :unprocessable_entity
      return
    end

    unless validate_format(format)
      render json: { error: 'Invalid format' }, status: :unprocessable_entity
      return
    end

    unless validate_dimensions(width, height)
      render json: { error: 'Invalid dimensions' }, status: :unprocessable_entity
      return
    end

    temp_input = Tempfile.new(['input', File.extname(uploaded_file.original_filename)])
    temp_output = Tempfile.new(['output', ".#{format}"])

    begin
      temp_input.binmode
      temp_input.write(uploaded_file.read)
      temp_input.close

      args = build_convert_args(temp_input.path, temp_output.path, format, width, height)
      
      success = system(CONVERT_PATH, *args)

      unless success
        render json: { error: 'Image conversion failed' }, status: :internal_server_error
        return
      end

      send_file temp_output.path,
                filename: "converted.#{format}",
                type: "image/#{format}",
                disposition: 'attachment'
    ensure
      temp_input.close
      temp_input.unlink
      temp_output.close
      temp_output.unlink
    end
  end

  private

  def validate_format(format)
    format.present? && ALLOWED_FORMATS.include?(format.downcase)
  end

  def validate_dimensions(width, height)
    return true if width.blank? && height.blank?

    width_valid = width.blank? || (width.to_i.to_s == width.to_s && width.to_i.between?(MIN_SIZE, MAX_SIZE))
    height_valid = height.blank? || (height.to_i.to_s == height.to_s && height.to_i.between?(MIN_SIZE, MAX_SIZE))

    width_valid && height_valid
  end

  def build_convert_args(input_path, output_path, format, width, height)
    args = []
    
    args << input_path

    if width.present? || height.present?
      resize_value = "#{width.presence || ''}x#{height.presence || ''}"
      args << '-resize'
      args << resize_value
    end

    args << '-format'
    args << format.downcase

    args << output_path

    args
  end
end
